channel.title: vscode TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from vscode

item.title: This is no April Fools’ joke… we just hit 1M subscribers on YouTube 🎉 Thank you to our amazing community for building, learning, and growing with us. This milestone is yours, happy coding! 💙 #VSCode #techtok #programming #learnontikok
item.description: This is no April Fools’ joke… we just hit 1M subscribers on YouTube 🎉 Thank you to our amazing community for building, learning, and growing with us. This milestone is yours, happy coding! 💙 #VSCode #techtok #programming #learnontikok

item.title: Did you see the latest VS Code release? 👀 ✨ Preview videos in the image carousel 📋 Copy chat responses into markdown 🔍 Troubleshoot chat problems ⚡ Updated #codebase command ...and more! See what's new → http://aka.ms/VSCode/114
item.description: Did you see the latest VS Code release? 👀 ✨ Preview videos in the image carousel 📋 Copy chat responses into markdown 🔍 Troubleshoot chat problems ⚡ Updated #codebase command ...and more! See what's new → http://aka.ms/VSCode/114

item.title: #vscode introduces message steering and queuing. ✨ You can now send follow-up messages while an agent request is still running. #ai #agenticcoding
item.description: #vscode introduces message steering and queuing. ✨ You can now send follow-up messages while an agent request is still running. #ai #agenticcoding

item.title: Thank you for 1 million on YouTube!#vscode
item.description: Thank you for 1 million on YouTube!#vscode

item.title: 🌐 The integrated browser in VS Code now has pinch-to-zoom and zoom shortcuts on macOS, better agent tool descriptions, and more updates. Learn more → https://aka.ms/VSCode/115
item.description: 🌐 The integrated browser in VS Code now has pinch-to-zoom and zoom shortcuts on macOS, better agent tool descriptions, and more updates. Learn more → https://aka.ms/VSCode/115

item.description: Voice-to-text in #vscode

item.title: Sandbox your local MCP Servers: Running MCP servers locally can pose security risks as they have the same permissions as the user running VS Code, which enables them to access files or network resources they shouldn't need for their functionality. To redu
item.description: Sandbox your local MCP Servers: Running MCP servers locally can pose security risks as they have the same permissions as the user running VS Code, which enables them to access files or network resources they shouldn't need for their functionality. To redu

item.title: Install your own MCP server in the GitHub Copilot CLI Learn how to install and use your own MCP Servers into the GitHub Copilot CLI #programming #softwaredevelopment #cli #copilot 🔗 Repo: https://github.com/liamchampton/f1-race-engineer-mcp
item.description: Install your own MCP server in the GitHub Copilot CLI Learn how to install and use your own MCP Servers into the GitHub Copilot CLI #programming #softwaredevelopment #cli #copilot 🔗 Repo: https://github.com/liamchampton/f1-race-engineer-mcp

item.title: ⚡🤯 The fastest way to copy, paste, and edit multiple lines in VS Code… and most devs have NO idea this exists. Just place your cursor at the start of the line, use this shortcut, and watch the magic happen ✨⌨️ Bonus: Multi-line editing will save you even
item.description: ⚡🤯 The fastest way to copy, paste, and edit multiple lines in VS Code… and most devs have NO idea this exists. Just place your cursor at the start of the line, use this shortcut, and watch the magic happen ✨⌨️ Bonus: Multi-line editing will save you even

item.title: Install Agent Plugins in VS Code to add skills, commands, MCP servers, hooks, and more ⚡#CodingTips #VSCode
item.description: Install Agent Plugins in VS Code to add skills, commands, MCP servers, hooks, and more ⚡#CodingTips #VSCode

item.title: 🪄 Your agent experience, refined. The latest VS Code release brings better BYOK visibility and control, integrated browser improvements, and more. It also introduces the new Agents window (preview), making it easier to explore, iterate on, and review tas
item.description: 🪄 Your agent experience, refined. The latest VS Code release brings better BYOK visibility and control, integrated browser improvements, and more. It also introduces the new Agents window (preview), making it easier to explore, iterate on, and review tas

item.title: Want better prompts in #VSCode? 👀 The Chat Customizations Evaluation extension helps you analyze and refine prompts, agents, instructions, and skills for GitHub Copilot. #techtok #code
item.description: Want better prompts in #VSCode? 👀 The Chat Customizations Evaluation extension helps you analyze and refine prompts, agents, instructions, and skills for GitHub Copilot. #techtok #code

item.title: 📝 New Markdown preview experience: you can now quickly switch between preview and editor view in #VSCode #techtok #programming
item.description: 📝 New Markdown preview experience: you can now quickly switch between preview and editor view in #VSCode #techtok #programming

item.title: 🚀 The new #VSCode release adds Mermaid diagram rendering directly in the Markdown preview and HTML file previews in the Integrated Browser. 👀 Check out the new release: https://aka.ms/VSCode/121 #techtok #programming #code
item.description: 🚀 The new #VSCode release adds Mermaid diagram rendering directly in the Markdown preview and HTML file previews in the Integrated Browser. 👀 Check out the new release: https://aka.ms/VSCode/121 #techtok #programming #code

item.title: Your AI coding assistant is WAY more customizable than most people realize 👀 Custom instructions, prompts, hooks, MCP servers, skills, and more… all inside the new Agent Customizations window in VS Code 🤯 #vscode #githubcopilot #ai #coding #programming
item.description: Your AI coding assistant is WAY more customizable than most people realize 👀 Custom instructions, prompts, hooks, MCP servers, skills, and more… all inside the new Agent Customizations window in VS Code 🤯 #vscode #githubcopilot #ai #coding #programming

item.title: VS Code Hooks might be one of the most underrated AI features right now 👀 Automatically run actions after edits, enforce rules, trigger workflows, and customize how your AI coding assistant behaves — all inside VS Code. This is where AI coding starts feel
item.description: VS Code Hooks might be one of the most underrated AI features right now 👀 Automatically run actions after edits, enforce rules, trigger workflows, and customize how your AI coding assistant behaves — all inside VS Code. This is where AI coding starts feel

item.title: Most people use AI coding assistants with random prompts 😅 But reusable prompts in VS Code let you save workflows, standardize tasks, and get more consistent results from GitHub Copilot. Once you start using prompt files, it’s hard to go back 👀 #vscode #g
item.description: Most people use AI coding assistants with random prompts 😅 But reusable prompts in VS Code let you save workflows, standardize tasks, and get more consistent results from GitHub Copilot. Once you start using prompt files, it’s hard to go back 👀 #vscode #g

item.title: Keep your chat context clean 👀 Run skills in a dedicated sub agent in #VSCodeand avoid filling your main context window ⚡ #techtok #programming #devtok
item.description: Keep your chat context clean 👀 Run skills in a dedicated sub agent in #VSCodeand avoid filling your main context window ⚡ #techtok #programming #devtok

item.title: One of the coolest things about GitHub Copilot isn’t just writing code… It’s learning while you code 🤯 Ask questions, break down complex concepts, explain unfamiliar code, generate examples, or even have Copilot teach you entirely new frameworks and langu
item.description: One of the coolest things about GitHub Copilot isn’t just writing code… It’s learning while you code 🤯 Ask questions, break down complex concepts, explain unfamiliar code, generate examples, or even have Copilot teach you entirely new frameworks and langu

item.title: There are 10 types of devs… which one are you? 👾 #vscode #devtok #developers
item.description: There are 10 types of devs… which one are you? 👾 #vscode #devtok #developers

item.title: VS Code just made diagrams WAY easier 🤯 Create Mermaid diagrams directly in Markdown, notebooks, and chat. No extra extension needed. #vscode #coding #programming #developer #softwareengineer
item.description: VS Code just made diagrams WAY easier 🤯 Create Mermaid diagrams directly in Markdown, notebooks, and chat. No extra extension needed. #vscode #coding #programming #developer #softwareengineer

item.title: 🚀 The new #VSCode release brings updates to the Agents window (preview): send sessions to the background, switch between them with a searchable picker, and get more editor space with a single click. 👀 Check out the new release: https://aka.ms/VSCode/124 #
item.description: 🚀 The new #VSCode release brings updates to the Agents window (preview): send sessions to the background, switch between them with a searchable picker, and get more editor space with a single click. 👀 Check out the new release: https://aka.ms/VSCode/124 #

item.title: 3 MCP Severs I use daily 🔌 The 3 MCP servers I use in VS Code every single day. GitHub, Playwright & Microsoft Learn take GitHub Copilot Agent mode to the next level. Review PRs, test your app in a real browser, and pull the latest docs for context. Here'
item.description: 3 MCP Severs I use daily 🔌 The 3 MCP servers I use in VS Code every single day. GitHub, Playwright & Microsoft Learn take GitHub Copilot Agent mode to the next level. Review PRs, test your app in a real browser, and pull the latest docs for context. Here'

item.title: 🚀 VS Code just expanded your AI model options! Just browse, install, and your new models show up in the picker! 🔗 Explore the weekly updates: https://aka.ms/VSCode/125 #VSCode #techtok #code #devtok
